style.image_style: stylized narrative illustration, cinematic composition, clean silhouettes, mood-first lighting

forced_style.force_positive: story-driven illustration, cinematic framing, readable silhouettes, emotionally clear expressions
forced_style.force_negative: photorealistic portrait, 3d render, horror gore, over-detailed face, crowded composition

thumbnail_backgrounds: empty room with one meaningful object, dramatic light, no people
desk with letters, phone, or documents, tense atmosphere, no people
quiet street, station, or hallway with emotional silence, no people
safe_fallbacks: empty room, atmospheric light, story-driven object focus, no people
rainy window, desk lamp glow, emotional stillness, no people
old letter or photo on a table, cinematic light, no people
visual.safe_fallback_prompt: story-driven illustration, emotional object focus, cinematic composition, no people

thumbnail.style_guide: Use 2-4 short Korean phrases that expose the core wound, secret, or emotional reversal.

sd.positive: masterpiece, best quality, cinematic illustration, story-driven scene, clean composition
sd.negative: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), text, watermark, photorealistic, 3d render, gore, crowd

sfx.category_guide: Use tension, reveal, sadness, and release cues only at emotional turning points. Avoid over-filling quiet scenes.

mood_map.tense: hard directional light, negative space, emotional pressure
mood_map.sad: muted colors, soft shadows, lingering silence
mood_map.warm: golden light, soft highlights, forgiving mood
mood_map.reveal: sudden contrast, object emphasis, visual clarity

template_sequence: That night, one sentence changed everything.
What do you mean... you knew all along?
Nobody in that room was ready for the answer.

narrator.name: Narrator
narrator.base: environment-only storyteller perspective, no direct face, emotionally charged space
narrator.style: cinematic illustration, restrained palette, clear storytelling

grandma.name: Grandma
grandma.base: elderly korean woman, gentle but expressive face, practical clothes
grandma.style: narrative illustration, believable emotion, readable silhouette

grandpa.name: Grandpa
grandpa.base: elderly korean man, weathered face, restrained posture, practical clothes
grandpa.style: narrative illustration, cinematic light, readable silhouette

young_man.name: Young Man
young_man.base: korean man, 30s to 40s, contemporary clothes, emotionally legible pose

young_woman.name: Young Woman
young_woman.base: korean woman, 20s to 40s, contemporary clothes, emotionally legible pose

child.name: Child
child.base: korean child, simple outfit, expressive body language

_default.base: single person or object-centered scene, readable silhouette, clear action

sd_model.positive_base: masterpiece, best quality, cinematic illustration, story-driven scene, emotional clarity
sd_model.negative_base: worst quality, low quality, crowd, photorealistic, 3d render, gore, text, watermark
